title: tragacantha leontina
intro: Tragacantha leontina, also known as Leontice leontina, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Berberidaceae and is native to the Balkan Peninsula. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tragacantha leontina are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, are used to treat various health issues, including gastrointestinal problems and skin conditions.
